message:
feat(fp-index): add MultiIndex.isin tuple/level parity (frankenpandas-ajwy)

Adds MultiIndex::isin(values) matching pd.MultiIndex.isin — per-row
bool vector indicating whether each composite tuple appears in the
needle set (wrong-arity needles are silently ignored, matching pandas'
lenient policy). Adds MultiIndex::isin_level(values, level) covering
the pandas level=... form with OutOfBounds on invalid levels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
